name: Cape Cod Blueberry Cake
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Cup (1 stick) butter or shortening, softened
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Mix flour, baking soda, baking powder, salt, cinnamon, and nutmeg in a medium bowl.
3. Beat butter and sugar in a large bowl with an electric mixer on medium speed until light and fluffy.
4. Add egg. Gradually beat in water and corn syrup.
5. Stir in the flour mixture until smooth. Stir in the cereal.
6. Pour batter into a greased and floured 9-inch square pan.
7. Bake for 40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Serve warm. Makes 12 servings.
